title: 10 best herbal essential oils for heartburn
intro_desc: Herbal essential oils for heartburn are concentrated plant extracts that have natural anti-inflammatory and soothing properties, which can provide relief from the burning sensation associated with heartburn. These oils help by reducing inflammation in the esophagus and stomach lining, calming acid reflux, and promoting digestion. For example, peppermint, ginger, and chamomile essential oils have been shown to effectively alleviate heartburn symptoms, allowing individuals to enjoy meals without discomfort and improving their overall quality of life.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Ginger essential oils helps with heartburn because of its natural anti-inflammatory properties that soothe and calm the digestive system. The oil's active compound, gingerol, has been shown to reduce inflammation in the esophagus and stomach lining, providing relief from acid reflux and discomfort. Additionally, ginger's warming properties help to stimulate digestion, promoting a smoother movement of food through the digestive tract and reducing the likelihood of stomach contents flowing back up into the esophagus, thereby alleviating heartburn symptoms.
remedy_properties: Digestive stimulant property: Ginger essential oil stimulates digestive enzymes and helps to reduce inflammation in the esophagus and stomach, which can alleviate symptoms of heartburn.
Antispasmodic property: The antispasmodic properties of ginger essential oil help to relax the muscles in the digestive tract, reducing spasms and contractions that can contribute to heartburn.

Anti-inflammatory property: Ginger essential oil's anti-inflammatory properties help to reduce inflammation in the esophagus and stomach lining, which can alleviate symptoms of acid reflux and heartburn.
remedy_parts: Rhyzomes: Rich in bioactive compounds like gingerols and shogaols, which have natural anti-inflammatory properties that help alleviate heartburn symptoms.
Roots: Containing a high concentration of sesquiterpenes, which have been shown to have gastroprotective effects and reduce inflammation associated with heartburn.
remedy_recipe: Harvest high-quality fresh ginger root with no signs of mold or decay for distillation purposes.
Wash the harvested ginger root thoroughly with lukewarm water and mild soap solution.
Dry the washed ginger root in a warm place away from direct sunlight for 24 hours.
Steam distill the dried ginger root using a copper still and pure water at 100°c for 2 hours.
Collect the obtained essential oil and filter it through a coffee filter paper to remove impurities.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Peppermint essential oils helps with heartburn because its active compounds, including menthol and menthone, have natural anti-inflammatory properties that soothe the digestive tract. When applied topically or inhaled, peppermint oil relaxes the muscles in the esophagus and stomach, reducing inflammation and alleviating symptoms of heartburn such as acid reflux and bloating. Additionally, peppermint's calming effects on the smooth muscle may help to reduce contractions that can exacerbate heartburn, providing fast and effective relief from discomfort.
remedy_properties: Digestive Stimulant: Peppermint oil stimulates digestion and relieves symptoms such as bloating, cramps, and discomfort associated with heartburn, by increasing gut motility and reducing inflammation.

Anti-Inflammatory: Peppermint oil has anti-inflammatory properties that can help reduce inflammation in the esophagus and stomach lining, which can exacerbate heartburn symptoms, and soothe irritated tissues.
Antispasmodic: Peppermint oil's antispasmodic properties help relax the muscles in the esophagus and stomach, reducing spasms and contractions that can worsen heartburn symptoms.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of the peppermint plant contain a high concentration of menthol, which helps to soothe and calm digestive issues like heartburn.
Barks: The bark of the peppermint plant is rich in antioxidants and flavonoids, which help to reduce inflammation and ease the symptoms of heartburn.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 10-15 fresh peppermint leaves at peak growth for optimal potency and flavor.
Steam distill the harvested peppermint leaves using a high-quality distillation apparatus for 3 hours.
Monitor the distillation process carefully, collecting the essential oil as it separates from the plant material.
Strain the resulting oil through cheesecloth or a coffee filter to remove any impurities and sediment.
Bottle the final product in dark glass containers with tight-fitting lids, storing at room temperature for up to 6 months.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Fennel essential oils helps with heartburn because of its natural anti-inflammatory and relaxant properties. The oil has been shown to soothe the digestive tract, reducing inflammation and discomfort associated with heartburn. Additionally, fennel's natural anxiolytic effects can help calm stomach acid production, alleviating symptoms of acidity and burning sensation. By promoting a healthy digestive environment, fennel essential oils may provide relief from heartburn, making it a natural and effective remedy for those seeking to alleviate this common discomfort.
remedy_properties: Carminative property: Fennel essential oil helps to relieve digestive discomfort and reduce symptoms of heartburn by expelling gas and reducing inflammation in the stomach and intestines.

Antispasmodic property: The antispasmodic properties of fennel essential oil help to relax the smooth muscles in the digestive tract, reducing muscle spasms that can contribute to heartburn and acid reflux.

Digestive stimulant property: Fennel essential oil helps to stimulate digestion and improve gut motility, which can help to reduce symptoms of heartburn by preventing stomach acid from flowing back up into the esophagus.
remedy_parts: Roots: Fennel roots are rich in volatile oils and flavonoids, which help soothe digestive issues and alleviate symptoms of heartburn.
Seeds: Fennel seeds contain a unique compound called anethole, which has natural anti-inflammatory properties that can help reduce inflammation and discomfort associated with heartburn.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh fennel seeds at dawn when the plant is in full bloom for maximum potency.
Dry the harvested fennel seeds in a warm and dark place for exactly 7 days.
Steam distill the dried fennel seeds using a steam distillation apparatus for 4 hours and 30 minutes.
Combine the resulting essential oil with sweet almond oil in a ratio of 1:10 to dilute it effectively.
Store the finished essential oil blend in dark glass bottles away from direct sunlight.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Chamomile essential oils helps with heartburn because of its soothing and calming properties. The oil has anti-inflammatory compounds that can help reduce inflammation in the esophagus and stomach, which can alleviate symptoms of heartburn such as burning sensations and discomfort. Additionally, chamomile's natural relaxant properties can calm the muscles in the digestive tract, allowing for smoother digestion and reduced acid reflux. This natural remedy can provide relief from heartburn without the need for harsh chemicals or medications.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory property: Chamomile essential oil helps reduce inflammation in the esophagus, which can contribute to heartburn symptoms by soothing and calming the irritated tissues.

Anxiolytic (anxiety-reducing) property: The calming effects of chamomile oil can help alleviate stress and anxiety, which are common triggers for heartburn episodes, allowing the body to better digest food without discomfort.

Antispasmodic property: Chamomile essential oil's ability to relax and calm muscle spasms in the esophagus and stomach can help ease symptoms of heartburn by reducing contractions that can worsen acid reflux.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of the chamomile plant contain apigenin, a flavonoid that helps to soothe and calm the digestive system, alleviating symptoms of heartburn.
Flowers: The flowers of the chamomile plant are rich in essential fatty acids, which help to reduce inflammation and ease the discomfort associated with heartburn.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh matricaria chamomilla flowers at dawn or early morning for maximum potency.
Dry the harvested flowers in a warm, dark place for 7-10 days to reduce moisture content.
Combine 100g of dried matricaria chamomilla flowers with 500ml of carrier oil such as sweet almond or jojoba oil.
Store the mixture in an airtight container and leave it to infuse for 14-21 days, shaking daily.
Strain the mixture through cheesecloth or a coffee filter into a clean glass bottle, discarding the solids and retaining the liquid.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Licorice essential oils helps with heartburn because of its anti-inflammatory properties, which help to soothe and protect the mucous membranes in the esophagus. The oil's flavonoids also work to neutralize stomach acid and reduce inflammation caused by heartburn, providing relief from burning sensations and discomfort. Additionally, licorice root has been shown to relax the muscles in the digestive tract, allowing food to pass through more smoothly and reducing symptoms of indigestion and bloating.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory property: Herbal licorice essential oil has anti-inflammatory properties that help reduce inflammation and irritation in the esophagus and stomach, alleviating symptoms of heartburn and acid reflux.

Gastric protector property: The essential oil has been shown to protect the stomach lining from damage caused by acid reflux and reduce the production of acid in the stomach, thereby providing relief from heartburn symptoms.
Antacid property: Herbal licorice essential oil has natural antacid properties that help neutralize excess stomach acid and relieve symptoms of heartburn, indigestion, and bloating.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in glycyrrhizin, a compound that soothes digestive issues and reduces inflammation, making it an effective remedy for heartburn.
Rhyzomes: Contains flavonoids and terpenes that help reduce acidity and inflammation in the stomach, providing relief from heartburn symptoms.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh or dried licorice root glycyrrhiza glabra plant material in sufficient quantity for the desired yield of essential oil.
Dry the harvested plant material using air circulation or oven drying method at 60°c temperature for 24 hours.
Steam distill the dried plant material with distilled water ratio 1:5 at 100°c pressure and 40°c temperature for 4-6 hours.
Separate the essential oil from the distilled steam using condenser equipment and collect it in a suitable container.
Store the obtained essential oil in amber glass bottles with tight-fitting lids in a cool dark place away from direct sunlight for up to 12 months.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Marshmallow essential oils helps with heartburn because of its soothing and calming properties. The oil's mucilages, which are complex carbohydrates, form a protective barrier on the esophageal lining, reducing inflammation and discomfort associated with acid reflux. Additionally, marshmallow essential oil's anti-inflammatory compounds help to decrease irritation in the esophagus, allowing for easier digestion and relief from heartburn symptoms. By providing a calming coating to the digestive tract, marshmallow essential oil helps to alleviate the burning sensation caused by stomach acid flowing back up into the esophagus.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory property: Marshmallow essential oil contains anti-inflammatory compounds that help reduce inflammation in the esophagus and stomach lining, which can alleviate symptoms of heartburn such as burning sensations and discomfort.

Soothing and protective mucilaginous property: Marshmallow essential oil contains mucilages, which are thick, protective substances that create a barrier on the mucous membranes to soothe and protect them from irritation caused by acid reflux, reducing inflammation and discomfort.

Antioxidant property: Marshmallow essential oil contains antioxidants that help neutralize free radicals and reduce oxidative stress in the body, which can contribute to heartburn symptoms such as inflammation and tissue damage.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots are used due to their high mucilage content, which helps to soothe and protect the esophageal lining, providing relief from heartburn symptoms.
Barks: The barks contain a high concentration of saponins, which have anti-inflammatory properties that can help reduce inflammation in the esophagus and alleviate heartburn discomfort.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh leaves of althaea officinalis and dry them thoroughly for at least 24 hours.
Crush dried leaves into small pieces using a mortar and pestle to release their natural oils.
Transfer crushed leaves to a clean glass jar and add 200ml of carrier oil such as coconut or olive oil.
Steep mixture in a cool dark place for 6 weeks, shaking the jar every other day to facilitate extraction.
Strain oil through cheesecloth or a coffee filter into another clean glass container and store it in an airtight bottle.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Slippery elm essential oils helps with heartburn because its unique composition provides a soothing and protective barrier for the esophagus and stomach lining. The mucilage properties of slippery elm help to calm inflammation, reduce irritation, and neutralize acidity, providing instant relief from the burning sensation associated with heartburn. Additionally, the oil's natural anti-inflammatory compounds aid in reducing swelling and discomfort, promoting a healthy digestive environment and alleviating symptoms of heartburn and acid reflux.
remedy_properties: Soothing mucilages: Slippery elm contains mucilages, which are gel-like substances that can help soothe and protect the mucous membranes in the esophagus, reducing inflammation and discomfort associated with heartburn.

Antioxidant properties: Slippery elm has antioxidant properties that may help reduce oxidative stress and inflammation in the body, which can contribute to heartburn symptoms like acid reflux and digestive upset.

Anti-inflammatory compounds: Slippery elm contains anti-inflammatory compounds like flavonoids and phenolic acids, which may help reduce inflammation in the esophagus and alleviate symptoms of heartburn, such as burning sensations and discomfort.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots are rich in mucilage, a soothing substance that can help calm and protect the digestive tract lining, providing relief from heartburn symptoms.
Barks: The barks contain a high concentration of flavonoids, which have anti-inflammatory properties that can help reduce inflammation and discomfort associated with heartburn.
remedy_recipe: Harvest high-quality ulmus rubra leaves and stems for extraction.
Dry harvested plant material by air circulation or gentle heat.
Steam distill dried plant material with distilled water at atmospheric pressure.
Collect and filter the resulting essential oil from steam distillation process.
Store the finished ulmus rubra essential oil in dark glass containers with tight lids.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Dill essential oils helps with heartburn because of its natural anti-inflammatory properties, which soothe and calm the stomach lining. The oil's carvone content helps to neutralize stomach acid and reduce inflammation, providing quick relief from symptoms like burning sensations and discomfort. Additionally, dill's digestive benefits can help to improve digestion, reducing the likelihood of heartburn episodes and promoting overall gut health.
remedy_properties: Digestive Stimulant: Dill essential oil's digestive stimulant property helps to stimulate the production of digestive enzymes, which can help alleviate symptoms of heartburn and indigestion by breaking down food more efficiently.
Antispasmodic: The antispasmodic properties of dill essential oil can help relax the muscles in the esophagus and stomach, reducing the likelihood of acid reflux and heartburn episodes.
Anti-Inflammatory: Dill essential oil's anti-inflammatory properties may help reduce inflammation in the digestive tract, which can contribute to heartburn symptoms such as pain and discomfort.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of the dill plant contain compounds like carvone, which has natural anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making it effective in relieving heartburn symptoms.
Seeds: Dill seeds are rich in volatile oils like carvotanacetone, which have a soothing effect on the digestive tract and can help alleviate heartburn discomfort.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh anethum graveolens leaves and stems at dawn or dusk when the aroma is most potent and the plant is dry enough to handle.
Dry the harvested material by spreading it out in a single layer on paper towels or clean cloths for 7-10 days until it reaches 10% moisture content.
Fill a clean glass jar with 1 cup of dried anethum graveolens leaves and stems, adding 1/4 cup of carrier oil such as sweet almond oil or jojoba oil.
Place the jar in a cool dark place for 2-3 weeks, shaking it twice daily to help the essential oil infuse into the carrier oil at room temperature.

Strain the mixture through cheesecloth or a coffee filter into another clean glass jar, discarding the solids and leaving approximately 1 ounce of anethum graveolens essential oil to be used as needed.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Thyme essential oils helps with heartburn because of its natural anti-inflammatory properties, which can help soothe and calm the esophageal mucous membranes. The oil's antacid properties also help neutralize stomach acid, providing relief from the burning sensation caused by acid reflux. Additionally, thyme's carminative properties aid in digestion, reducing symptoms of indigestion and bloating that often accompany heartburn. As a natural remedy, thyme essential oil can provide quick and effective relief from heartburn without harsh chemicals or pharmaceuticals.
remedy_properties: Antacid property: Thyme essential oil has antacid properties, which help neutralize excess stomach acid and relieve heartburn symptoms by reducing inflammation in the esophagus.

Anti-inflammatory property: Thyme oil's anti-inflammatory compounds, such as carvacrol and thymol, help reduce inflammation in the esophageal lining, alleviating discomfort and pain associated with heartburn.

Antispasmodic property: Thyme essential oil has a calming effect on the digestive system, reducing spasms and contractions that can exacerbate heartburn symptoms, providing relief from discomfort and bloating.
remedy_parts: Roots: Thyme roots are rich in flavonoids, which have been shown to have anti-inflammatory properties that can help alleviate heartburn symptoms.
Seeds: Thyme seeds contain a high concentration of sesquiterpenes, which have been found to have soothing and calming effects on the digestive system.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh thymus vulgaris leaves and flowers at dawn on a dry day.
Wash the plant material with distilled water to remove dirt and debris gently.
Steam distill the plant material in a still using 30 grams of leaves and flowers for 4 hours.
Combine the resulting essential oil with a carrier oil such as coconut or olive oil in a 10% dilution ratio after cooling.
Store the blended oil in a dark glass bottle at room temperature for up to 6 months.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Cape jasmine essential oils helps with heartburn because of its natural anti-inflammatory properties, which soothe and calm the digestive tract. The oil's active compounds, such as flavonoids and phenolic acids, have been shown to reduce inflammation in the esophagus and stomach lining, providing relief from symptoms like burning sensations and discomfort. Additionally, cape jasmine essential oils have a relaxing effect on the muscles of the digestive tract, helping to prevent acid reflux and alleviate heartburn episodes.
remedy_properties: Antispasmodic property: Cape Jasmine essential oil has antispasmodic properties, which can help to relax the muscles in the esophagus and stomach, reducing inflammation and discomfort caused by heartburn.

Anti-inflammatory property: The anti-inflammatory properties of Cape Jasmine essential oil can help to reduce inflammation in the digestive tract, which is a common cause of heartburn symptoms such as burning sensation and pain.

Gastroprotective property: Cape Jasmine essential oil has been shown to have gastroprotective effects, which means it can help protect the stomach lining from damage caused by acid reflux, reducing the risk of ulcers and other complications associated with heartburn.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of the Cape Jasmine plant have been traditionally used to treat digestive issues, including heartburn, due to their anti-inflammatory and soothing properties.
Barks: The barks of the Cape Jasmine plant contain compounds that help reduce inflammation and ease stomach discomfort associated with heartburn.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh gardenia jasminoides flowers at dawn when they are fully bloomed and free of pesticides.
Cleanse the harvested flowers by rinsing them gently with distilled water and removing any excess moisture.
Steam distill the cleaned flowers using a high-quality steam distillation apparatus with 5 liters of still water for 4 hours.
Separate the essential oil from the distilled water using a separating funnel, resulting in 20 milliliters of pure gardenia jasminoides essential oil.
Bottle and label the essential oil immediately after separation and store it in a cool dark place for future use.

supplementary_best_treatment: The best way to treat heartburn with herbal essential oils is to dilute them in a carrier oil and apply topically to the affected area. Geranium essential oil helps to reduce inflammation and relax the muscles, while chamomile essential oil soothes and calms the digestive system. Add a few drops of each oil to a base oil like coconut or olive oil and gently massage onto the chest or stomach area after meals. This can provide fast relief from heartburn symptoms.
supplementary_causes: Ailments similar to heartburn that are treated with herbal essential oils are digestive disorders such as indigestion, bloating, and irritable bowel syndrome (IBS). Certain essential oils like peppermint, ginger, fennel, and lemongrass help alleviate these symptoms by relaxing the muscles in the digestive tract, reducing inflammation, and improving digestion. These oils can be inhaled directly or blended with a carrier oil for topical application to provide relief from discomfort and distress.
